Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Standard P2P process flow 1 Create Purchase Requisition 2 Approve Purchase Requisition 3 Issue Purchase Order PO 4 Receive Goods 5 Vendor Invoice Received 6 Match Invoice to PO 3 way match PO Goods Receipt Invoice 7 Release Payment 8 Close Case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: This follows the standard P2P process correctly No anomalies

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 1002 2024 02 01 08 40 Issue Purchase Order ANOMALY PO issued before requisition approved

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: 2024 02 03 07 15 Release Payment ANOMALY Payment released before goods received before approval before 3 way match

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: 2024 02 03 08 00 Approve Purchase Requisition ANOMALY Approval happened after PO and payment

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: 2024 02 04 09 00 Receive Goods ANOMALY Goods received after payment

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: 2024 02 05 08 00 Match Invoice to PO ANOMALY 3 way match after payment

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Approval happened AFTER PO was issued AND after payment was released backdating fraud risk

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Goods received AFTER payment paying for goods not yet received

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 1003 2024 02 08 11 00 Release Payment ANOMALY Payment released before goods received and before invoice

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: 2024 02 09 12 00 Vendor Invoice Received ANOMALY Invoice received after payment

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: 2024 02 10 13 00 Receive Goods ANOMALY Goods received after payment

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: 2024 02 11 14 00 Match Invoice to PO ANOMALY 3 way match after payment

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: This could indicate fraud or significant process control failure

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 1004 2024 02 06 09 00 Receive Goods ANOMALY Goods received before PO issued

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: 2024 02 06 09 15 Issue Purchase Order ANOMALY PO issued after goods received

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Goods received BEFORE Purchase Order was issued this is a serious control failure You typically need a PO to know what was ordered to verify the goods match the order and to have a contractual basis for receiving

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: This could indicate informal unauthorized purchasing maverick buying or fraud
